# Elland - A Roblox World for Ella

**Elland** is an open-ended Roblox game world built for a young explorer. The whole world - terrain, river, hill, buildings - is generated by server code (`WorldBuilder`) every time the server starts. Players spawn at the riverside Hub and can travel freely between zones, play a daily Wordle puzzle, shop at the Fashion Boutique, and sit on the swing at Ella's Lookout.

## Game Features

- **Open-Ended Gameplay**: All zones accessible from the start - no forced progression
- **Procedurally Built World**: Terrain, river, hill, and all structures are created by `WorldBuilder.lua` on server start
- **Zones** (see `Constants.ZONES`):
  - **By the River (Hub)**: Central spawn point with a welcome sign and bench
  - **Ella's Lookout**: A big cone-shaped hill with a wishing tree and a working rope swing
  - **Ella's House**: A cozy gabled house
  - **Wordle Library**: Daily 5-letter word puzzle (6 attempts, 50-coin reward) - fully playable
  - **Fashion Boutique**: Buy cosmetic items with Coins at the working shop
  - **Building Area**: Free-build platform - *not yet implemented* (interaction stub only)
- **Shared Economy**: Coins persist across sessions via DataStores
- **Zone Map**: Press **M** to open the teleport menu
- **Interactions**: Glowing ProximityPrompts at the Wordle Library, Fashion Boutique, Building Area, and the swing

## Tech Stack

- **[Rojo](https://rojo.space/)**: File sync between filesystem and Roblox Studio (pinned via `aftman.toml`)
- **[Aftman](https://github.com/LPGhatguy/aftman)**: Toolchain manager for Rojo
- **Luau**: All game logic (Roblox's Lua dialect)
- **ModuleScripts**: Reusable, maintainable systems

## Project Structure

```
Elland/
├── default.project.json            # Rojo configuration
├── aftman.toml                     # Pins the Rojo toolchain
├── src/
│   ├── ServerScriptService/
│   │   ├── Init.server.lua         # Main server initialization
│   │   ├── PlayerDataService.lua   # DataStore persistence (raw DataStoreService)
│   │   ├── CurrencyManager.lua     # Economy + purchases (server-side item catalog)
│   │   ├── ZoneManager.lua         # Zone teleportation
│   │   ├── WordleManager.lua       # Server-authoritative Wordle (API + fallback)
│   │   ├── WorldBuilder.lua        # Generates terrain + all structures
│   │   └── InteractionManager.lua  # ProximityPrompts for world objects
│   ├── ReplicatedStorage/
│   │   └── Shared/
│   │       └── Constants.lua       # Shared config: zones, words, shop items, economy
│   └── StarterPlayer/
│       └── StarterPlayerScripts/
│           ├── ClientController.client.lua  # HUD + client bootstrap
│           ├── WordleUI.lua                 # Wordle game interface
│           ├── ZoneMenuUI.lua               # Zone map / teleport menu (M key)
│           └── FashionUI.lua                # Fashion Boutique shop interface
└── README.md
```

## Getting Started

### Prerequisites

1. **Install [Aftman](https://github.com/LPGhatguy/aftman)**, then install the pinned tools:
   ```bash
   aftman install
   ```
   (Or install Rojo manually from https://github.com/rojo-rbx/rojo/releases)

2. **Install Roblox Studio** from [roblox.com/create](https://www.roblox.com/create)

3. **Install the [Rojo plugin](https://rojo.space/docs/v7/getting-started/installation/#installing-the-plugin)** in Roblox Studio

### Setup

1. **Clone the repository**
   ```bash
   git clone https://github.com/cmc0619/Elland.git
   cd Elland
   ```

2. **Start the Rojo server**
   ```bash
   rojo serve
   ```

3. **Open Roblox Studio**
   - Open a new Baseplate
   - Click the **Rojo** plugin button, **Connect** to `localhost:34872`, and **Sync In**

4. **Play**
   - Press Play (F5). You should spawn at the Hub ("By the River").
   - Check the Output window for initialization messages.

> DataStores require **Game Settings → Security → Enable Studio Access to API Services** in Studio. Without it, the game falls back to default data in Studio. The same setting enables the Wordle daily-word API call; without it, Wordle uses its offline word list.

## Core Systems

### WorldBuilder
Runs on every server start (called from `Init.server.lua`) and builds the entire world: base terrain, a meandering river with a sandy bed, Ella's Lookout (cone hill + wishing tree + rope swing), Ella's House, the Wordle Library, the Fashion Boutique, the Building Area platform, and spawn locations for every zone. When finished it sets `Workspace:GetAttribute("WorldBuilt")` to `true` so other services can wait on it deterministically.

### PlayerDataService
Player persistence using raw `DataStoreService` (`GetAsync`/`SetAsync` with retries, auto-save every 5 minutes, save on leave and on server shutdown). New players start with 100 Coins (`Constants.STARTING_CURRENCY`). Saved data is merged with the defaults on load, so new fields (like fashion purchases) are added safely for existing players.

### CurrencyManager
Unified economy. Purchases are validated against a server-side item catalog built from `Constants.FASHION.ITEMS` - the client only sends an item ID and the server decides the price, charges the player, grants the item, and reports the outcome via `PurchaseResult`.

### WordleManager
Server-authoritative daily Wordle. The daily word is fetched from the [Random Words API](https://random-words-api.kushcreates.com) (`GET /api?category=wordle&length=5&words=1`, retried with a timeout and validated as 5 letters A-Z) and cached per date so everyone gets the same puzzle. If the API is unreachable, it falls back to a deterministic `Random.new(dateSeed)` pick from the vendored `Constants.WORDLE.WORDS` list - the game works fully offline. Guesses are validated against the vendored list.

### Fashion Boutique (FashionUI + CurrencyManager)
Walk up to the boutique and use the glowing prompt to open the shop. `FashionUI` lists the items from `Constants.FASHION.ITEMS` with name, description, cost, and a Buy button (or an Owned badge). Buying fires `PurchaseRequest` with just the item ID; the server validates funds and ownership, deducts the Coins, records the item in the player's saved data (`Zones.FashionBoutique.OwnedItems`), and replies via `PurchaseResult`, which updates the UI. The shop's coin display stays in sync via the shared `CurrencyChanged` event. Purchases are currently recorded as owned cosmetics; applying them visually to the character is a future improvement.

### ZoneManager
Teleportation between zones. Spawn locations are resolved via `Constants.ZONES[*].SpawnName`. Players always (re)spawn at the Hub.

### InteractionManager
Creates the `OpenWordleUI` and `OpenFashionUI` RemoteEvents and glowing ProximityPrompts for the Wordle Library, Fashion Boutique, Building Area, and the swing. The Building Area prompt is an explicit "not yet implemented" stub.

## Development Workflow

1. Edit files in your editor (Rojo auto-detects changes when `rojo serve` is running)
2. Sync into Studio and test (F5)
3. Commit and push to `main`

### Testing Checklist
- [ ] No errors in Output on server start
- [ ] Player spawns at the Hub on solid ground
- [ ] HUD shows currency and zone name
- [ ] M opens the zone map; teleporting works
- [ ] Wordle prompt opens the Wordle UI; guesses validate and score correctly
- [ ] Boutique prompt opens the shop; buying an item deducts Coins and shows Owned
- [ ] The swing at Ella's Lookout actually swings when sat on
- [ ] No grass inside the river water

## Not Yet Implemented

- Applying purchased fashion items visually to the character
- Building Area building tools (stub prompt only)
- Zone icons in `Constants.ZONES` (asset uploads pending)
